lever: return cached adjacency row dictionaries without copying rows
reason: The candidate benchmarked faster but changed observable mutation semantics: mutating a returned adjacency row persisted in the FrankenNetworkX row cache while the native graph topology still reported no such edge.

isomorphism_notes.ordering: Golden adjacency serialization preserved node and neighbor order for the benchmark graph.
isomorphism_notes.tie_breaking: No algorithmic tie-breaking path was changed.
isomorphism_notes.floating_point: No floating-point computation path was changed.
isomorphism_notes.rng: The benchmark graph construction uses fixed seed=0; no RNG path was changed.
isomorphism_notes.mutation_contract: Rejected because returned-row mutation behavior was not coherent with native graph has_edge semantics.
